change: Remove ~60% of unused config keys: FEATURES.multimodal, FEATURES.streaming, FEATURES.caching, FEATURES.background_tasks, FEATURES.scheduled_tasks, FEATURES.privacy_preserving, FEATURES.monitoring, FEATURES.distributed_processing, DATA_ANALYTICS_CONFIG (entire), WEB_CONFIG (entire), MULTIMODAL_CONFIG (entire), SECURITY_CONFIG (entire), LLM_CONFIG.openai/anthropic/google/cohere sub-keys, DATABASE_CONFIG.postgres/mysql/document_db/key_value_store/orm.
impact: Reduces file from ~530 lines to ~200 lines. Zero runtime impact — none of these keys are read anywhere. Only keep: FEATURES.advanced_nlp/advanced_ml/voice_processing/data_analysis/web_integration/database/memory/response_generator/multi_agent, NLP_CONFIG.intent_recognition/entity_recognition/sentiment_analysis, RAG_CONFIG, RESPONSE_CONFIG, USER_PERSONALIZATION_CONFIG.

change: 4 subagents each have nearly identical delegate() implementations — only the systemPrompt differs. Extract a factory function: createSubagent(id, label, canHandle, systemPrompt) to reduce from ~280 lines to ~120.
impact: Cleaner code, easier to add new subagents. Zero behavior change — same prompts, same routing logic.

change: All 3 integration stubs are identical boilerplate with only name and action comments differing. Replace with a single factory: createIntegrationStub(name, actionExamples) in base.js.
impact: 3 files → 1 factory function. Phase 3 scaffolding is intentionally minimal — no need for separate files yet. Each real integration will need its own file when implemented anyway.

change: Remove 173 lines of commented-out handle_send_audio socket handler (lines ~320-493). It references disabled speech methods and will never be uncommented in its current form.
impact: Reduces app.py from ~515 to ~340 lines. Zero runtime impact — the code is commented out and the speech processor methods it calls return disabled errors anyway.

change: Remove 90 lines of commented-out HuggingFace and RASA intent classifier functions (initialize_huggingface_intent_classifier, initialize_rasa_interpreter, get_intent_huggingface, get_intent_rasa).
impact: Reduces file by ~35%. These functions were never activated and depend on packages (transformers, rasa) not in requirements.txt.

change: Remove duplicate tool registrations. registry.js already registers readFileTool, shellTool, searchTool, webTool, writeFileTool. index.js re-registers all of them plus writeFileTool a second time. Remove all registerTool() calls from index.js — keep only re-exports.
impact: Eliminates double registration. Tools are still registered exactly once (in registry.js). Cleaner separation: registry = registration, index = re-exports.

change: The initializeVectorStore() auto-call at module bottom fires on every import even when VECTOR_STORE_ENABLED is false. Wrap in a lazy getter so the chromadb dynamic import never fires when disabled.
impact: Faster cold start. Currently logs 'Vector store disabled — using LRU cache' on every module load — harmless but noisy.

change: setInterval(cleanExpiredSessions, 60000) keeps the Node process alive even after all work is done, causing `node -e 'import(...)'` to hang. Replace with a lazy cleanup that runs on demand or use unref(): setInterval(...).unref().
impact: Fixes test/dev tooling hangs. Production servers keep running normally — the interval still fires, but won't prevent graceful shutdown.
